label: WOJCIECH × TOMASZ KOWALSKI · ON TRACK · in Polish
framing: Wojciech, 52, Polish-speaking site supervisor, ON-TRACK. Paired with Tomasz Kowalski, Polish-speaking adviser at Harlesden. They speak in English on this call (translator nearby) but Tomasz can switch to Polish anytime.

lines.speaker: adviser
lines.text: Wojciech, this is Tomasz Kowalski calling. We can speak in Polish or English, whatever is easier. I am here for the supervisor interview prep.

lines.speaker: customer
lines.text: Thank you Tomasz. English is fine for everyday, but for the supervisor interview I would like to be sure I am saying exactly what I mean.

lines.speaker: adviser
lines.text: Sensible. So, Brent Park Developments. Site Supervisor, twenty-eight days from now. They've shortlisted you. Twenty-eight years on UK sites and a Polish-English fluent supervisor is genuinely rare for them.

lines.speaker: customer
lines.text: I am ready for this. I want to ask them about safety procedures and the team they have currently. I will not just answer their questions, I will ask my own.

lines.speaker: adviser
lines.text: Good, that's exactly the move. One thing. Your CSCS Gold Card top-up has been approved this morning. Free to you. The certificate will arrive by Friday.

lines.speaker: customer
lines.text: Excellent. With the Gold Card the salary band shifts up.

lines.speaker: adviser
lines.text: It does. And travel costs for the interview are covered. The translator will join the interview as well, on the speaker, if you want one for that day. Many candidates say yes for the safety questions specifically.

lines.speaker: customer
lines.text: Yes please. Let us add the translator. I would rather be precise than fast.
